## 🚀 NEXT STEPS

1. Open Eclipse
2. Right-click: src/test/java/com/ecommerce/tests/EcommerceAdminPanelTest.java
3. Select: Run As → JUnit Test
4. Watch tests execute!

OR

Run from command line:
```
mvn test
```
